Title: Datatrans - Complete Payment Flow
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Datatrans payment processor configured and active
- NOTE: redirect to /checkout/payment is the DESIGNED Datatrans flow (only redirect processor) — never mark BLOCKED because the flow is not cart-inline
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, DT_CARD=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.number), DT_EXP=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.expiry), DT_CVV=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.cvv), DT_OTP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)') if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' from cart page — this redirects to Datatrans payment flow at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans payment redirect or modal to load
[ACT] In the Datatrans form enter card number '@td(DATATRANCE_MC.number)', expiry '@td(DATATRANCE_MC.expiry)', CVV '@td(DATATRANCE_MC.cvv)'
[ACT] Complete payment flow within Datatrans hosted form; if an OTP prompt appears, enter '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)'
[WAIT] Wait for return redirect back to storefront
[ASSERT] User is returned to storefront after Datatrans payment completes
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page displayed with order number
Assertions:
[NAV] Clicking 'Place Order' from cart redirects to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment with Datatrans form
[NAV] After completing Datatrans flow user is redirected back to storefront order confirmation
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number and summary
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order appears in admin with Datatrans payment method
[NETWORK] Datatrans redirect handled correctly — no redirect loop
Failure_Signals: No redirect to /checkout/payment after placing order; Datatrans form does not load; return redirect to storefront fails; order not created

Title: Datatrans - OTP Authentication Flow
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Datatrans configured
- OTP challenge card and OTP value resolve via the DATATRANCE_OTP alias (see Test_Data) — the frictionless DATATRANCE_MC card never triggers the OTP prompt
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, DT_CARD=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.number), DT_EXP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.expiry), DT_CVV=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.cvv), DT_OTP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)'); click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment and Datatrans payment form
[ACT] Enter card number '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.number)', expiry '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.expiry)', CVV '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.cvv)' in Datatrans form
[ACT] Submit card details within Datatrans form
[WAIT] Wait for OTP prompt to appear (redirect or modal)
[ASSERT] OTP input prompt is displayed
[ACT] Enter OTP '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)'
[ACT] Submit the OTP
[WAIT] Wait for return redirect to storefront
[ASSERT] User redirected back to storefront order confirmation with order number
Assertions:
[NAV] Datatrans OTP prompt appears after card submission
[DOM] OTP input field is visible and accepts input
[NAV] After valid OTP submission user returns to storefront confirmation page
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order appears in admin with Datatrans payment method and status reflecting OTP-authenticated payment
Failure_Signals: OTP prompt does not appear; valid OTP rejected; return redirect to storefront fails; order confirmation not reached

Title: Datatrans - Invalid OTP Recovery
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item added
- Datatrans payment processor configured and active
- OTP challenge card resolves via the DATATRANCE_OTP alias (see Test_Data) — the frictionless DATATRANCE_MC card never triggers the OTP prompt
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, DT_CARD=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.number), DT_EXP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.expiry), DT_CVV=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.cvv), DT_OTP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)') if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' to initiate Datatrans redirect to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans payment form to load
[ACT] Enter card number '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.number)', expiry '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.expiry)', CVV '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.cvv)' in Datatrans form and submit
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans OTP prompt to appear
[ACT] At OTP input: fill OTP field with '000000' (intentionally incorrect)
[ACT] Submit the incorrect OTP
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans error response
[ASSERT] Error message displayed indicating invalid OTP
[ASSERT] Retry mechanism available — OTP field still accessible or re-prompted
[ACT] Fill OTP field with the correct value '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)'
[ACT] Submit the correct OTP
[WAIT] Wait for return redirect to storefront
[ASSERT] Payment succeeds; user reaches order confirmation
Assertions:
[DOM] Error message shown after incorrect OTP submission
[STATE] Retry mechanism available after invalid OTP (field not permanently locked)
[NAV] Correct OTP leads to successful return to storefront
[STATE] Only one order created — no duplicate from the failed first OTP attempt
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty on final successful submission
[ADMIN] Single order in admin — no duplicate orders from retry scenario
Failure_Signals: No error shown for incorrect OTP; OTP field locked without retry option; duplicate orders created from retry; correct OTP rejected after previous incorrect attempt

Title: Datatrans - Card Number Validation
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Datatrans payment form loaded at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment (reached via Place Order from cart)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; click 'Place Order'; wait for Datatrans form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[ACT] Fill card number field with a value that fails Luhn check (e.g., a sequential number that is clearly invalid)
[ACT] Fill other fields with valid-format values (future expiry, valid CVV length)
[ACT] Attempt to proceed / submit card details
[ASSERT] Validation error appears on card number field
[ASSERT] Payment cannot proceed with invalid card number
Assertions:
[DOM] Card number validation error displayed
[STATE] Datatrans form blocks progression with invalid card
[NAV] User remains on {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] No createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation fired
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions
Failure_Signals: Invalid card number accepted; Datatrans form submits with Luhn-failing card; no error shown on card field
References: Coverage Gap Analysis; BL gap: no client-validation invariant exists in business-logic.md (ex-BL-PAY-003 unpromoted) — PROPOSED-BL backlog

Title: Datatrans - Return to Store After Payment Completion
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Datatrans configured
- OTP value resolves via @td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp) if the 3DS step-up challenge is prompted
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, DT_CARD=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.number), DT_EXP=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.expiry), DT_CVV=@td(DATATRANCE_MC.cvv), DT_OTP=@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)'); click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment and Datatrans payment form
[ACT] Complete full Datatrans payment flow; if an OTP step-up prompt appears, enter '@td(DATATRANCE_OTP.otp)'
[WAIT] Wait for automatic redirect back to storefront
[ASSERT] User is automatically redirected to storefront after Datatrans completes (no manual action required)
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page shows order number
[ASSERT] Ordered items and totals on confirmation match the cart contents
[ASSERT] Shipping address on confirmation matches the address entered during checkout
[NAV] Navigate to account order history
[ASSERT] Order appears in account order history
Assertions:
[NAV] Automatic redirect from Datatrans back to storefront without manual intervention
[DOM] Order confirmation page shows order number, line items, totals, shipping address
[MATH] Totals on confirmation match original cart totals
[NAV] Order visible in account order history
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order in admin with correct total and Datatrans payment method
Failure_Signals: No automatic redirect — user stranded on Datatrans page; order confirmation page missing order number; cart contents not reflected on confirmation; order absent from account history

Title: Datatrans Lightbox - French locale renders French labels
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Store has Datatrans payment method enabled
- Storefront locale set to French (fr)
- At least one product in cart
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and switch language to French via language selector
[ASSERT] Verify storefront header/UI labels are in French
[ACT] Add a product to cart and proceed to checkout
[NAV] Navigate to /checkout/payment page
[ASSERT] Verify 'Pay Now' button label is in French (e.g. 'Payer maintenant')
[ACT] Select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)'); Datatrans lightbox opens
[ASSERT] Verify lightbox title and field labels are in French (e.g. 'Méthode de paiement')
[ASSERT] Verify no English-language labels appear in the lightbox
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Payer maintenant' or French equivalent visible on Pay Now button
[DOM] Datatrans lightbox labels are French (not English)
[DOM] No English label leakage inside lightbox
[STATE] storefront locale is fr
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /graphql (initializeCartPayment) request includes cultureName: 'fr'
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during lightbox load
Failure_Signals: Pay Now button still in English; lightbox shows English labels; cultureName not sent in API call
Cleanup: Close tab; restore locale to English

Title: Datatrans Lightbox - English locale (default) renders English labels
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Store has Datatrans payment method enabled
- Storefront locale is English (en) — default
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} with default English locale
[ACT] Add a product to cart and proceed to checkout
[NAV] Navigate to /checkout/payment page
[ASSERT] Verify 'Pay Now' button label is English
[ACT] Select payment method containing 'Datatrans' (displayed as 'Bank card (Datatrans)'); lightbox opens
[ASSERT] Verify lightbox labels are English
[ASSERT] Verify no untranslated i18n key strings (e.g. 'shared.catalog.product_details...')
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Pay Now' button label is English
[DOM] Datatrans lightbox labels are English
[DOM] No raw i18n key strings visible
[STATE] storefront locale is en
Cross_Layer_Checks:
